meta.note: Review three-tile model. 01 OPEN=Introduction = hook (background) + identify (hinge, fill-in) + a direct overall-impression line (aim). No Therefore/Consequently: a review intro states a verdict, it does not draw a logical conclusion. 02 ARGUE=Features (3 building lines). 03 CLOSE=Recommendation. KEY ADDITION over essays: feature signposts carry a join type. signpostJoin:'self' = the signpost completes itself and ends in is/was, so it pairs DIRECTLY with the key (view suppressed). signpostJoin:'open' = a short lead-in that takes a view between signpost and key. The engine reads _join to assemble each feature line cleanly. Support (reason/example/result/compare/contrast) surfaces as the * footnote on Feature tiles. Types are review SUBJECTS.

background: Regarded/Considered as one of the best ...,
By far one of the best ... is ...,
Choosing a ... can be a real challenge.
If you are looking for a ..., then ... can be an ideal choice.
When it comes to choosing a ..., the options can be overwhelming.
Few ... have impressed me as much as ...

open.t: Anyone interested in ... will be especially impressed by

What stands out most about it is

standout.t: By far the best feature is
The absolute crown jewel of the experience was
Hands down, the finest part is
The undeniable pinnacle of it all was
What truly steals the show is
Above all, what sets it apart is

first.t: The thing most likely to impress you is
The first thing that stands out is

view: what I personally loved was that
what really impressed me was that
I was particularly struck by how
what blew me away was that
what left the deepest impression on me was that
